message:
docs(connectors): fix rustdoc backticks in live_verification tests

Wrap identifier-like references (e.g. slack.list_channels,
github.list_pull_requests) in backticks per rustdoc convention
so they render as inline code in cargo doc output and pass the
rustdoc lint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
